rows.label: qev010102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Could you fetch those car parts for me? I
want to fix this thing, but more than
that... I really want to get to know you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0002
rows.name:
I knew you wouldn't say no. Taking
on any unreasonable request, even
with a troubled look on your face...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0003
rows.name:
Because that's exactly the kind of
ally of justice you are, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0011
rows.name: Puff out your chest and agree confidently.

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0021
rows.name: Shake your head and say you aren't that type.

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0004
rows.name:
Good answer. You can't strike down
evil after evil if you hesitate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0005
rows.name:
I expected that reaction.
Sincere and humble, never
boasting about your own virtues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Alright, I need you to go and get
me a New-model Anhydrous Radiator.
I'm counting on you, my ideal hero![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0007
rows.name:
The movies and anime I love are full of
allies of justice just like you. I've
looked up to them since I was a kid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0008
rows.name:
I never thought one would
actually show up to save me...
It's like a dream come true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Hey, once you bring back the
New-model Anhydrous Radiator, mind
if I ask you a few questions?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0034
rows.name:
I just want to know everything
about you, my hero.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Let's see... An ally of justice
definitely needs an unwavering will
that pierces through everything, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Tell me, do you have some incredible
motive for hating a great evil?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0012
rows.name:
Like a close friend being murdered right
in front of you, or an absolute conviction
you've held onto since childhood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0031
rows.name: Confess that you actually have an incredible motive.

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0041
rows.name: Give a wry smile and say you don't have anything that exaggerated.

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0013
rows.name:
That's an interesting story.
You really are as close to
my ideal hero as it gets![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0014
rows.name:
...I see. So you don't need a
reason for a righteous fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Yeah, maybe I was
overthinking things a bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Yup, talking to you makes the world I've
dreamed of feel more and more real.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0017
rows.name:
You'll smash through the numerous traps set by a
mighty enemy with those feelings of yours! You'll
keep moving forward, unyielding to tragedy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0018
rows.name:
And then, the grand finale. The people
who oppressed you will finally acknowledge
you and shower you with praise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0019
rows.name:
A perfect morality tale stripped of
all unnecessary fluff. This is exactly
the story I've been dreaming of![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0020
rows.name:
That's right... I volunteered
for BLADE because I was looking
for a story like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0021
rows.name:
It seems I'm not cut out to be a hero
myself, but to think someone like you
would appear... Ahhh... I'm so excited![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0050
rows.name: Appreciate

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0051
rows.name: Thank Justin for his high praise.

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0060
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0061
rows.name: Inform him that you brought the car parts.

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0022
rows.name:
...I'm just stating the obvious. Oh
right, did you manage to get your hands
on the New-model Anhydrous Radiator?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Whoops, sorry for getting carried
away. I asked you to fetch a New-model
Anhydrous Radiator, didn't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0035
rows.name: How did it go? Did you find the parts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0024
rows.name:
...Yeah, this should let
me fix it right up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0025
rows.name:
I feel like I received something much
bigger from you than just car parts.
Here's a token of my gratitude. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0026
rows.name:
Please keep reaching out a hand to
those in need. You are an officially
recognized ally of justice, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0070
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0071
rows.name: Nod without hesitation.

rows.label: qev010102_JNK0080
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: qev010102_SEL0081
rows.name: Give a vague answer, saying it depends on the situation.

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0027
rows.name:
With a BLADE like you around, the citizens
of NLA have no need to fear any evil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0028
rows.name:
You won't make promises you aren't
certain of... huh? That's fine,
that's another form of justice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0029
rows.name:
Even so, you're a BLADE. Whether
you like it or not, you'll end
up fighting for this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0030
rows.name: ...Well then, I'll be going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0031
rows.name:
I might be a BLADE, but I
don't exactly tear it up on
the front lines like you do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0032
rows.name:
We probably won't have many chances
to meet... But I feel some kind
of grand destiny between us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010102_MSG0033
rows.name:
As long as you walk the path of justice...
Our paths are bound to cross again! When
that time comes, let's fight together.[ST:wait ]
